body.title: DickSimnel ToolLoop: switch from XML tags to native OR tool calling
body.result: native OR tool calling: tools/tool_calls on InferenceRequest/Response, TOOL_DEFINITIONS in toolloop, role:tool messages, 19 tests
body.description:
DickSimnel's ToolLoop uses a custom XML tag format (<TOOL:Bash>...</TOOL>) that OR models are not trained on. Models make tool calls but drift without converging to DONE, hitting the iteration cap. Root cause: protocol mismatch, not model capability. Fix: add tools/tool_calls fields to InferenceRequest/InferenceResponse, thread tools through _or_call and tool_calls through _parse_response, then replace XML regex parsing in ToolLoop with structured response.tool_calls. DONE detection becomes finish_reason=='stop' with no tool_calls — no ambiguity.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/shim.py, devices/inference/device.py, devices/dicksimnel/toolloop.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (n/a); OOP-first — modifying existing dataclasses and methods, no new standalone functions; test-plan-or-why-not: tests required.
**Scope boundary:** In scope: InferenceRequest.tools field (list|None=None), InferenceResponse.tool_calls field (list|None=None), _or_call includes tools when present, _parse_response extracts tool_calls, ToolLoop dispatches from tool_calls and stops when empty. Out of scope: Ollama tool use, MinionDevice ToolLoop, model selection, budget ledger, Anthropic API path.
**Completion criteria:** (1) _parse_response populates tool_calls from choices[0].message.tool_calls when present; (2) ToolLoop dispatches tools via response.tool_calls instead of XML regex; (3) XML _TOOL_PATTERN regex removed from toolloop.py; (4) existing ToolLoop tests pass; (5) new tests: _parse_response correctly extracts tool_calls from an OR-format response dict; ToolLoop calls a tool when tool_calls present and stops when tool_calls is empty/absent with finish_reason stop.
